_documentation.description: UI customization configuration for OpenClaude CLI
instructions: 1. Edit any value to customize the UI behavior
2. Save this file and restart OpenClaude to see changes
3. Set values to null to use defaults

options.disableShimmer: Set to true to disable shimmer effects (reduces CPU usage)
options.spinnerChars: Array of characters for loading spinner animation
options.messages.maxHeight: Maximum height for a single message (lines)
options.input.showLineNumbers: Show line numbers in input area
options.statusLine.showModel: Show model name in status line
options.statusLine.showCost: Show session cost in status line
options.statusLine.showTokens: Show token usage in status line
options.statusLine.showGitBranch: Show git branch in status line
options.diff.showLineNumbers: Show line numbers in diff view
options.diff.contextLines: Number of context lines around changes
